sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 포티넷은 4분기 매출 19억 1,000만 달러를 기록하며 견조한 성장세를 보였고, 자사주 매입 규모를 10억 달러 증액했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 15% 증가한 19억 1,000만 달러를 기록하며 견조한 실적을 달성했습니다.
Unified SASE 및 보안 운영 시장에 대한 전략적 투자를 가속화하며 포트폴리오 전반에서 광범위한 수요를 확인했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 자사주 매입 프로그램을 10억 달러 증액하여 2027년 2월 28일까지 총 102억 5,000만 달러 규모의 매입을 승인했습니다.
엔비디아와 통합 솔루션을 발표하고, 가트너 피어 인사이트에서 3년 연속 보안 서비스 엣지 부문 고객 선택 기업으로 선정되었습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 청구액(Billings)은 전년 대비 18% 증가한 23억 7,000만 달러를 기록했습니다.
4분기 제품 매출은 전년 대비 20% 성장한 6억 9,100만 달러를 달성했습니다.

watchItems.text: 방화벽 시장 점유율 55%를 유지하는 가운데, SASE 및 보안 운영 시장으로의 리더십 확장 속도와 고객 수요 지속 여부를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 ftntq4-2025ex991.htm PRESS RELEASE Document Press Release Fortinet Reports Strong Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results Fourth Quarter 2025 Highlights • Revenue grew 15% year over year to $1.91 billion • Product revenue grew 20% year over year to $691 million • Billings grew 18% to $2.37 billion 1 • Unified SASE billings grew 40% • GAAP operating margin of 33% • Non-GAAP operating margin of 37% 1 Full Year 2025 Highlights • Revenue grew 14% year over year to $6.80 billion • Product revenue grew 16% year over year to $2.22 billion • Billings grew 16% to $7.55 billion 1 • Unified SASE & SecOps billings grew 24% • GAAP opera  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.91 billion = 19억 1,000만 달러; $691 million = 6억 9,100만 달러; $2.37 billion = 23억 7,000만 달러; $6.80 billion = 68억 달러; $2.22 billion = 22억 2,000만 달러; $7.55 billion = 75억 5,000만 달러; $2.21 billion = 22억 1,000만 달러; $1.91 = 1.91달러; $2.37 = 2.37달러; $691 = 691달러; $6.80 = 6.80달러; $2.22 = 2.22달러; $7.55 = 7.55달러; $2.21 = 2.21달러.

driving the convergence of networking and security, today announced financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and full year ended December 31, 2025. “We are pleased with our strong finish to the year, highlighted by an excellent fourth quarter driven by broad-based demand across our portfolio, which drove billings above the high end of our guidance,” said Ken Xie, Founder, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Fortinet. “We continue to execute our strategy by accelerating our investments in high-growth Unified SASE and Security Operations markets, delivering strong momentum while further strengthening our Secure Networking leadership. As the #1 firewall leader with a 55% unit market share, Fortinet is well-positioned to extend that leadership into SASE, driven by our rapidly expanding SASE adoption and growing customer demand. Our easy-to-adopt FortiSASE solution, powered by ou

r single FortiOS operating system, supports both sovereign and public deployments, delivering high performance with significantly lower total cost of ownership than the competition.” Recent Business Highlights • Announced an integrated solution with NVIDIA that delivers isolated infrastructure acceleration for the AI Factory, embedding FortiGate VM on BlueField-3 DPUs to provide firewalling, segmentation and policy enforcement directly in the infrastructure for higher performance, stronger isolation and simpler operations. • Recognized as a Gartner Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Security Service Edge for the third consecutive year, making Fortinet the only cybersecurity vendor to receive this distinction. • Named the inaugural Google Unified Security Recommended partner for network protection, recognizing FortiSASE and FortiGate NGFW for delivering converged networking and security

natively on Google Cloud. • Won the 2025 Red Dot Product Design Award for the FortiGate Rugged series, Fortinet’s second consecutive win, recognizing design excellence, reliability and performance at the industrial edge. Fortinet Expands Share Repurchase Authorization by $1.0 Billion Fortinet today announced that its Board of Directors has authorized an increase of its share repurchase program by $1.0 billion worth of shares of common stock, for an aggregate authorized repurchase amount of up to $10.25 billion through February 28, 2027. As of February 4, 2026 approximately $1.38 billion remained available under the share repurchase program, including the $1.0 billion increase. Repurchases under Fortinet’s share repurchase program may be made through privately negotiated transactions or open market tran  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.0 Billion = 10억 달러; $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; $10.25 billion = 102억 5,000만 달러; $1.38 billion = 13억 8,000만 달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러; $10.25 = 10.25달러; $1.38 = 1.38달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
